caption: 浙里办票在线发票

view.params:
SELECT kpnr.SID,kpnr.wfgs
FROM kpnr
WHERE   (kpnr.kpsh<>"") and (kpnr.kpsh is not null)
ORDER BY kpnr.SID ASC

SELECT rypdj.SID,rypdj.djbm
FROM rypdj
WHERE   (rypdj.ryxm=:ryxm)
ORDER BY rypdj.SID ASC

SELECT cghtsheet.SID,cght.cgry
FROM cght,cghtsheet
WHERE   (cght.SID=cghtsheet.PID)
   AND  (cght.wxht=[客户索赔.外销合同1])
   AND  (((cghtsheet.cpbh=[客户索赔.索赔详细.产品编号]) and ([客户索赔.索赔详细.产品编号]<>""))
   or  ((cghtsheet.khhh=[客户索赔.索赔详细.客户货号]) and ([客户索赔.索赔详细.客户货号]<>""))
  or  ((cghtsheet.bjhh=:bjhh)  and (:bjhh<>"")))
    AND CheckRole('采购合同')
ORDER BY cghtsheet.SID ASC

name: 浙里办票在线发票
title_field: 浙里办票在线发票.发票号码
